---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.toy_forge_pla_bundle
alias: toy_forge_pla_bundle
purchased_on: 2025-11-12
total_eur: 72
counterparty: Filamenthütte Wien
project: Toy Forge Saturdays
related_entity: Badger
lines:
  - item: PLA spool mixed colors
    quantity: 3
    unit_eur: 24
    line_eur: 72
---

| related_entity | Badger                    |
+----------------+---------------------------+
```

## Line Items

| # | item                   | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |

| 1 | PLA spool mixed colors | 3   | 24       | 72       |

```

## Notes

Older family-printing consumables that only got sorted once Toy Forge became a named lane.
